mapper.insert: INSERT INTO worker (sfid, tablename, sycapproveflg, syncstatus, deleteflg, syncedtime) VALUES(#{sfid}, #{tablename}, #{sycapproveflg}, #{syncstatus}, #{deleteflg}, #{syncedtime})
mapper.update: UPDATE worker SET tablename=#{tablename}, sycapproveflg=#{sycapproveflg}, syncstatus=#{syncstatus}, deleteflg=#{deleteflg}, syncedtime=#{syncedtime} WHERE sfid=#{sfid}
